title: Vat types collection GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of a collection of vat types.

collection.description: The array containing all the vat types.

vatTypeNumber.description: A unique identifier of the vat type.

self.description: A unique link reference to the vat type item.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the vat type collection.
